######## control_flow ########
=== prog ===
(*ast.BlockStmt)({
 List: ([]ast.Node) (len=6) {
  (*ast.LetStmt)({
   Pos: (ast.Pos) 1,
   Ident: (ast.Token) {
    Typ: (ast.TokenType) 30,
    Pos: (ast.Pos) 5,
    Val: (string) (len=1) "x",
    Line: (int) 2
   },
   Type: (*ast.NumberType)({
    Pos: (ast.Pos) 1
   }),
   Val: (*ast.NumberLit)({
    Pos: (ast.Pos) 9,
    IntVal: (int64) 0,
    FloatVal: (float64) 0,
    IsFloat: (bool) false
   })
  }),
  (*ast.WhileStmt)({
   Pos: (ast.Pos) 12,
   Condition: (*ast.BinaryExpr)({
    Pos: (ast.Pos) 20,
    Left: (*ast.Ident)({
     Pos: (ast.Pos) 18,
     Value: (string) (len=1) "x"
    }),
    Right: (*ast.NumberLit)({
     Pos: (ast.Pos) 22,
     IntVal: (int64) 10,
     FloatVal: (float64) 10,
     IsFloat: (bool) false
    }),
    Op: (ast.Token) {
     Typ: (ast.TokenType) 25,
     Pos: (ast.Pos) 20,
     Val: (string) (len=1) "<",
     Line: (int) 3
    }
   }),
   WhileBlock: (*ast.BlockStmt)({
    List: ([]ast.Node) (len=2) {
     (*ast.AssignStmt)({
      Pos: (ast.Pos) 28,
      Ident: (ast.Token) {
       Typ: (ast.TokenType) 30,
       Pos: (ast.Pos) 28,
       Val: (string) (len=1) "x",
       Line: (int) 4
      },
      Val: (*ast.BinaryExpr)({
       Pos: (ast.Pos) 34,
       Left: (*ast.Ident)({
        Pos: (ast.Pos) 32,
        Value: (string) (len=1) "x"
       }),
       Right: (*ast.NumberLit)({
        Pos: (ast.Pos) 36,

(*info.ActionList)({

  (info.EnemyProfile) {
   Level: (int) 100,
   HP: (float64) 9.99999999e+08,
   Resist: (attributes.ElementMap) (len=8) {
    (attributes.Element) 0: (float64) 0.1,
    (attributes.Element) 1: (float64) 0.1,
    (attributes.Element) 2: (float64) 0.1,
    (attributes.Element) 3: (float64) 0.1,

(*ast.BlockStmt)({
 List: ([]ast.Node) (len=3) {
  (*ast.LetStmt)({
   Pos: (ast.Pos) 0,
   Ident: (ast.Token) {
    Typ: (ast.TokenType) 30,
    Pos: (ast.Pos) 4,
    Val: (string) (len=15) "_execute_action",
    Line: (int) 1
   },
   Type: (*ast.NumberType)({
    Pos: (ast.Pos) 0
   }),

(*ast.BlockStmt)({
 List: ([]ast.Node) (len=2) {
  (*ast.BlockStmt)({
   List: ([]ast.Node) (len=1) {
    (*ast.CallExpr)({
     Pos: (ast.Pos) 1561,
     Fun: (*ast.Ident)({
      Pos: (ast.Pos) 1567,
      Value: (string) (len=14) "execute_action"
     }),

(*info.ActionList)({
 Targets: ([]info.EnemyProfile) (len=1) {
  (info.EnemyProfile) {
   Level: (int) 100,
